name: pubmed-mcp-server
description: Search PubMed/Europe PMC, fetch articles and full text (PMC/EPMC/Unpaywall), citations, MeSH terms.

ncbi_api_key.title: NCBI API Key
ncbi_api_key.description: Optional NCBI API key for higher rate limits (10 req/s vs 3 req/s). Generate one at https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/account/settings/.

ncbi_admin_email.title: NCBI Admin Email
ncbi_admin_email.description: Contact email sent with NCBI requests (recommended by NCBI).

unpaywall_email.title: Unpaywall Email
unpaywall_email.description: Contact email for Unpaywall. When set, pubmed_fetch_fulltext falls back to Unpaywall open-access copies for DOIs not in PMC.
